title: filago germanica var. eriocephala
intro: Filago germanica var. eriocephala, also known as the hairy cudweed, is a plant species within the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to Europe and Asia. The medicinal properties of hairy cudweed include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which are used in various herbal remedies. The health benefits of using hairy cudweed include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and soothing digestive issues. Hairy cudweed can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
